text:
until You come to me. is a Japanese animated short directed by Tadashi Hiramatsu with art direction and illustrations by Tatsuya Kushida. The short was broadcast online on the ' website on 19 December 2014. The short is accompanied by a version of "Danny Boy" by Shirō Sagisu. It is intended to showcase the talent of new khara staff, and isn't related to the story of the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.

Shinji Ikari
Rei Ayanami (tentative name)
Asuka Shikinami Langley
Gendo Ikari
Kaworu Nagisa
